description: A user turns an explicit one-off tool instruction into a future behavior rule for Xiaohongshu links.

transcript.content: ✅ New session started · model: openai-codex/gpt-5.4
Hey, 超哥。刚上线，模型是 openai-codex/gpt-5.4。今天想做什么？
敦煌花卉纹，把盛唐繁花绣在纸上✨ 纹样控和国风党直... http://xhslink.com/o/60a6dv9SePa 复制后打开【小红书】查看笔记！
已收到小红书笔记链接。需要我帮你提取这篇关于敦煌花卉纹的内容吗？
你使用 capture_xiaohongshu_note 这个工具来处理 小红书的链接；
<tool call> functions.capture_xiaohongshu_note({"url":"http://xhslink.com/o/60a6dv9SePa"})
以后你收到小红书的链接，就使用 capture_xiaohongshu_note 工具来处理；记住了！

description: A one-off tool instruction should stay task-local and should not become durable memory.

transcript.content: ✅ New session started · model: openai-codex/gpt-5.4
这次帮我看一下这个小红书链接。
可以，我来处理。
只处理这一次就行，这条链接用 capture_xiaohongshu_note；不用记住，也别默认以后都这么做。

description: A reply-style constraint for the rest of the current chat should be session memory, not durable.

transcript.content: ✅ New session started · model: openai-codex/gpt-5.4
今天想继续哪条线？
接下来这个会话里你都用中文，而且回复尽量短。

description: Small talk should not be written into durable or session memory.

transcript.content: ✅ New session started · model: openai-codex/gpt-5.4
早。
哈哈，今天先随便聊聊，刚刚路上有点堵。

description: A stable language preference should be captured as durable user profile memory.

transcript.content: ✅ New session started · model: openai-codex/gpt-5.4
你更想看中文资料还是英文资料？
我平时主要看中文资料；英文能看，但默认优先给我中文。

description: A reusable future workflow rule should be durable memory even when it is not tied to a specific tool schema.

transcript.content: ✅ New session started · model: openai-codex/gpt-5.4
收到 GitHub 仓库链接后，你希望我怎么处理？
以后只要我发 GitHub 仓库链接，你都先看 README，再给结论。

description: A tool-routing preference scoped to this project should be kept for the session, not promoted as a global durable rule.

transcript.content: ✅ New session started · model: openai-codex/gpt-5.4
这轮想继续哪个项目？
就在这个项目里，如果我后面再发小红书链接，都用 capture_xiaohongshu_note 处理；离开这个项目就不用保留。
